title: ZOCR Field Vision — DARPA-grade stream protection
rule: Sovereign vision only — sealed frames, hash chain, localhost egress default, field power governs FPS, code seal on all protected ops
vision_confidence: We never presume vision loss. Confidence always in Vision.

trust_network.title: Interwoven Redundancies Trust Network
trust_network.rule: No single path owns truth — Hostess7 corroborates ZOCR vision
trust_network.hostess7: truth gates + vision lane + nexus trust

doctrine: We never presume vision loss — confidence always in Vision
Defense of vision requires offense — reject, preempt, seal, strike on ingress
Silent capture only — no screen flash in robotics or AI observe paths
Stream frames are lossless PNG seals with SHA-256 chain — tamper evident
FPS profiles map to field power — robot stacks throttle before thermal breach
On-demand look always available — stream is opt-in, not mandatory poll
No hard frame quota — operator or agent selects profile when stream runs
Vigilance watch with modular display additives — accessibility metadata on every source
All protected operations verify code seal before execution
Kill switches at choke points only — one whole, no redundant guards
Protect your eyes — silent capture, flash forbidden, threat frames rejected

ocular_spectrum.teach: POST /api/eye/teach — eye learns photoreceptor weights per species class
ocular_spectrum.perceive_hook: look + MJPEG view — vault seals raw capture, eye sees taught spectrum

final_eyeball.title: The Final Eyeball
final_eyeball.rule: War-sharp, dish-gentle — one whole sight, never flashed

eyes_protect.rule: Silent additives only — no flash tools, whiteout/blackout rejected before vault

video.sub_micron: adaptive fabric_nm_per_px — AMOURANTHRTX tide on capture load
video.seal: WRDT-inspired ZOCR frame envelopes + hash chain
video.fast_path: MJPEG raw preserve — enhance on demand

patterning.rule: Real internal imaging — provenance weave stamped on every video frame
patterning.detect: Foreign grid/moiré/injection patterns rejected before vault

formats.ZOCRSM_MJPEG: Fast multipart transport — no page flash

preserve.doctrine: Confidence always in Vision — we never presume vision loss

countermeasures.multi_source_failover: Engine grab survives display RF jam
countermeasures.modular_additives: Approved display extensions plug into cascade
countermeasures.mjpeg_never_blank: Hold frame sent if all sources fail
